scripts.stack:recreate: iot cloudformation delete-stack --stack-name ecs-ocpp-mqtt && echo 'wait 10sec' && sleep 10 && iot cloudformation create-stack --stack-name ecs-ocpp-mqtt --template-file cloudformation.yaml
scripts.build:push: docker build -t ghcr.io/gormantec/docker-ocpp-mqtt:latest . && docker push ghcr.io/gormantec/docker-ocpp-mqtt:latest
